entry.title: 博客重新出发
entry.content:
从默认的 Hexo 示例页开始，这个博客现在正式重新出发。

我希望它不只是一个发布文章的地方，也是一份长期维护的技术记录：遇到问题时怎么拆解，做项目时怎么取舍，学习新工具和人工智能能力时哪些路径有效，踩过的坑又怎样变成下一次的经验。

这里会记录什么

  • Web 开发中的前端、后端和工程化实践。
  • 人工智能方向的学习笔记、应用实验和项目记录。
  • 日常学习里值得沉淀的概念、工具和配置。
  • 项目开发过程中的问题排查、复盘和改进。
  • 让效率变高的小脚本、小技巧和工作流。

当前技术栈

这个站点使用 Hexo 生成静态页面，部署到 GitHub Pages。主题切换为 Fluid，目标是保持页面清爽、阅读舒服，同时补齐归档、分类、标签、搜索和代码阅读体验。后续也会把人工智能相关的学习、工具和项目实践放进来。

后续计划

接下来我会逐步补充更具体的文章分类，把学习记录和项目实践分开整理。每一篇文章都尽量保持一个明确主题：解释一个问题，沉淀一个方案，或者复盘一次实践。

如果未来回头看这些内容，希望能看到的不只是答案，还有当时思考问题的路径。

entry.title: 关于
entry.content:
你好，我是心平气和。

这里是我的个人技术博客，用来记录编程学习、项目实践、工具链配置、工程问题复盘，以及人工智能方向的学习和尝试。我会尽量把每次学习、排查和实验过程写清楚，让文章既能帮助未来的自己，也能给遇到类似问题的人一点参考。

关注方向

  • Web 开发与工程化
  • 后端服务与接口设计
  • 人工智能与 AI 应用实践
  • 自动化工具与效率实践
  • 项目复盘与技术笔记

联系方式

  • GitHub：2019717166
  • QQ：2019717166
  • 微信：jie-1537

:root { --dynamic-accent: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.34); --dynamic-accent-strong: rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.42); --dynamic-line: rgba(79, 115, 150, 0.16);}html { scroll-behavior: smooth;}body::before { content: ""; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -2; pointer-events: none; background: linear-gradient(115deg, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.07), transparent 38%), linear-gradient(245deg, rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.08), transparent 42%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 68px, var(--dynamic-line) 69px 70px), repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 68px, var(--dynamic-line) 69px 70px); background-size: 140% 140%, 150% 150%, auto, auto; animation: dynamic-grid 18s ease-in-out infinite alternate;}body::after { content: ""; position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: -1; pointer-events: none; background-image: linear-gradient(100deg, transparent 8%, var(--dynamic-accent) 9%, transparent 12%), linear-gradient(76deg, transparent 18%, var(--dynamic-accent-strong) 19%, transparent 22%), linear-gradient(122deg, transparent 66%, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.26) 67%, transparent 70%); background-size: 920px 420px, 760px 360px, 680px 520px; opacity: 0.42; animation: dynamic-circuit 22s linear infinite;}.banner { overflow: hidden;}.banner::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background: linear-gradient(120deg, transparent 20%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) 42%, transparent 62%); transform: translateX(-120%); animation: banner-scan 8s ease-in-out infinite;}.navbar { transition: box-shadow 220ms ease, background-color 220ms ease, transform 220ms ease;}.navbar.dynamic-scrolled { box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18);}.board,.post,.index-card,.archive,.category-list,.tag-cloud,.about-avatar,.about-name,.about-intro,.markdown-body > * { transition: opacity 520ms ease, transform 520ms ease, box-shadow 260ms ease;}.dynamic-reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(18px);}.dynamic-reveal.dynamic-visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0);}.index-card,.board { will-change: transform;}.index-card:hover,.board:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.12);}.markdown-body a { background-image: linear-gradient(currentColor, currentColor); background-position: 0 100%; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: 0 1px; transition: background-size 180ms ease, color 180ms ease;}.markdown-body a:hover { background-size: 100% 1px;}.highlight,figure.highlight { transition: transform 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease;}.highlight:hover,figure.highlight:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.14);}.home-dashboard { margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;}.home-hero-panel { position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 220px; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; min-height: 280px; padding: 2.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.22); border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94), rgba(239, 246, 255, 0.86)), radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2), transparent 34%); box-shadow: 0 22px 55px rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.1);}.home-hero-panel::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 34px 34px; mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, black 18%, black 82%, transparent); animation: home-grid-drift 16s linear infinite;}.home-kicker,.home-section-label { margin: 0 0 0.75rem; color: #2563eb; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;}.home-hero-panel h1 { position: relative; margin: 0; max-width: 680px; color: #172033; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.45rem); line-height: 1.16; font-weight: 800;}.home-summary { position: relative; max-width: 660px; margin: 1.1rem 0 0; color: #526176; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.85;}.home-signal { position: relative; width: 190px; height: 190px; justify-self: end;}.home-signal span { position: absolute; inset: calc(var(--i, 0) * 18px); border: 1px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28); border-radius: 50%; animation: home-pulse 3.8s ease-in-out infinite;}.home-signal span:nth-child(1) { --i: 0; }.home-signal span:nth-child(2) { --i: 1; animation-delay: 0.28s; }.home-signal span:nth-child(3) { --i: 2; animation-delay: 0.56s; }.home-signal span:nth-child(4) { --i: 3; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28), rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.18)); animation-delay: 0.84s;}.home-focus-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem;}.home-focus-card { display: block; min-height: 170px; padding: 1.35rem; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.22); border-radius: 8px; color: inherit; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.08); transition: transform 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease;}.home-focus-card:hover { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.34); box-shadow: 0 22px 44px rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.13);}.home-card-index { display: inline-flex; width: 2.2rem; height: 2.2rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 0.9rem; border-radius: 50%; color: #0f766e; background: rgba(15, 118, 110, 0.1); font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700;}.home-focus-card h2 { margin: 0 0 0.55rem; color: #172033; font-size: 1.16rem;}.home-focus-card p { margin: 0; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.7;}.home-workbench { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 180px; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; padding: 1.35rem; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.22); border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.86);}.home-workbench ul { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none;}.home-workbench li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 140px minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 1rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.18);}.home-workbench li:last-child { padding-bottom: 0; border-bottom: 0;}.home-workbench span { color: #172033; font-weight: 700;}.home-workbench em { color: #64748b; font-style: normal;}.home-actions { display: grid; align-content: center; gap: 0.7rem;}.home-actions a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 40px; border: 1px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.24); border-radius: 6px; color: #1d4ed8; background: rgba(239, 246, 255, 0.8); font-weight: 700; transition: transform 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease;}.home-actions a:hover { text-decoration: none; transform: translateX(3px); background: rgba(219, 234, 254, 0.95);}.home-latest-title { display: flex; align-items: end; justify-content: space-between; margin: 2rem 0 1rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.24);}.home-latest-title span { color: #172033; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800;}.home-latest-title small { color: #64748b; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;}html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-hero-panel,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-focus-card,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-workbench { border-color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.18); background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(32, 39, 52, 0.94), rgba(21, 25, 34, 0.92)), radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.16), transparent 34%);}html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-hero-panel h1,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-focus-card h2,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-workbench span,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-latest-title span { color: #f1f5f9;}html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-summary,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-focus-card p,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-workbench em,html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] .home-latest-title small { color: #a7b1c2;}html[data-user-color-scheme="dark"] body::before { --dynamic-line: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12); background: linear-gradient(115deg, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.1), transparent 38%), linear-gradient(245deg, rgba(45, 212, 191, 0.08), transparent 42%), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 68px, var(--dynamic-line) 69px 70px), repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 68px, var(--dynamic-line) 69px 70px);}@keyframes dynamic-grid { from { background-position: 0% 0%, 100% 0%, 0 0, 0 0; } to { background-position: 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 34px 18px, 18px 34px; }}@keyframes dynamic-circuit { from { background-position: 0 0, 100px 60px, 0 120px; } to { background-position: 920px 420px, -660px 360px, 680px -400px; }}@keyframes banner-scan { 0%, 52% { transform: translateX(-120%); } 78%, 100% { transform: translateX(120%); }}@keyframes home-grid-drift { from { background-position: 0 0; } to { background-position: 68px 34px; }}@keyframes home-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.96); opacity: 0.72; } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); opacity: 1; }}@media (max-width: 991px) { .home-hero-panel, .home-workbench { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .home-signal { justify-self: start; width: 140px; height: 140px; } .home-focus-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }}@media (max-width: 640px) { .home-hero-panel, .home-workbench, .home-focus-card { padding: 1.1rem; } .home-workbench li { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 0.25rem; } .home-latest-title { align-items: start; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; }}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 1ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; transition-duration: 1ms !important; } .dynamic-reveal { opacity: 1; transform: none; }}

(function () { 'use strict'; var reducedMotion = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches; function markNavbar() { var navbar = document.querySelector('.navbar'); if (!navbar) return; navbar.classList.toggle('dynamic-scrolled', window.scrollY > 12); } function setupReveal() { var targets = document.querySelectorAll('.index-card, .board, article, .archive, .category-list, .tag-cloud, .about-avatar, .about-name, .about-intro, .markdown-body > *'); if (reducedMotion || !('IntersectionObserver' in window)) { targets.forEach(function (item) { item.classList.add('dynamic-visible'); }); return; } var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) { entries.forEach(function (entry) { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add('dynamic-visible'); observer.unobserve(entry.target); } }); }, { threshold: 0.08, rootMargin: '0px 0px -6% 0px' }); targets.forEach(function (item, index) { item.classList.add('dynamic-reveal'); item.style.transitionDelay = Math.min(index * 28, 260) + 'ms'; observer.observe(item); }); } function setupPreviewRefreshHint() { if (!location.hostname.match(/^(localhost|127\.0\.0\.1)$/)) return; document.documentElement.dataset.localPreview = 'true'; } function addHomeDashboard() { if (location.pathname !== '/' && location.pathname !== '/index.html') return; var boardInner = document.querySelector('#board .col-12.col-md-10.m-auto'); if (!boardInner || document.querySelector('.home-dashboard')) return; var dashboard = document.createElement('section'); dashboard.className = 'home-dashboard'; dashboard.innerHTML = [ '
', '
', '

AI / Web / Engineering

', '

把学习、实验和项目复盘沉淀成可复用的经验

', '

这里会持续整理人工智能应用、Web 开发、工程化工具和项目实践。每篇文章都尽量回答一个具体问题，留下清晰的思考路径。

', '
', '
', ' ', '
', '
', '
', ' ', ' 01', '

人工智能

', '

记录 AI 工具、模型能力、应用实验和真实项目里的使用方式。

', ' ', ' ', ' 02', '

工程实践

', '

把开发过程中的设计、取舍、排错和部署经验整理成可回看的笔记。

', ' ', ' ', ' 03', '

持续复盘

', '

按时间线沉淀学习轨迹，让每次实践都能成为下一次的起点。

', ' ', '
', '
', '
', '

近期会补充

', '
    ', '
  • AI 应用开发提示词、工作流、工具调用、项目落地
    • ', '
  • Hexo 博客建设主题配置、自动化发布、本地编辑后台
    • ', '
  • Web 工程化调试记录、构建优化、部署经验
    • ', '
', '
', '
', ' 浏览归档', ' 查看标签', ' 联系我', '
', '
', '
', ' 最新文章', ' Latest Notes', '
' ].join(''); boardInner.insertBefore(dashboard, boardInner.firstChild); } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { markNavbar(); addHomeDashboard(); setupReveal(); setupPreviewRefreshHint(); }); window.addEventListener('scroll', markNavbar, { passive: true });})();
